subject: infra(deploy): migrate from GitHub Pages to Vercel
body:
GitHub Pages required a /see-veo/ base-path prefix, a 404.html copy hack
for SPA routing, and manual "source" configuration in repo settings.
Vercel handles all of this natively — serving at root /, SPA rewrites via
vercel.json, and env var injection in the dashboard.

Changes:
- Delete .github/workflows/deploy.yml
- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrites and Vite framework config
- Remove base: '/see-veo/' from vite.config.ts (Vite defaults to '/')
- Update PWA scope and start_url from '/see-veo/' to '/'
- Simplify navigateFallbackDenylist to target API paths instead of
  hardcoding the GitHub Pages domain
- Update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect Vercel deployment

Tags: deployment, vercel, infrastructure, pwa, migration
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-migration
Semver: major
